name: cc-enslaver
description: A Claude Code plugin and LLM-agnostic rule pack that enforces systematic thinking, verified citations, and root-cause analysis — eliminating reactive, lazy AI behavior. v0.17 extends CC_ENSLAVER_LANG=en to Imperial Edicts (圣旨) injection + DENY reason (full bilingual closure of v0.15's switch), fixes two Windows portability bugs (Layer (g) drive-letter regex; manage_edicts UTF-8 stdout), and does a comprehensive README refresh — 6→7 Stop-hook gates, Layer (g) bullet, /cc-enslaver:edict in command lists, repo tree matches actual layout, environment switches table.
